summary: A bilateral NDA between Acme Robotics and Globex Partners protecting confidential information exchanged while exploring a potential business relationship.

parties.name: Acme Robotics, Inc.
parties.evidence_quote: Acme Robotics, Inc., a Delaware corporation

parties.name: Globex Partners LLC
parties.evidence_quote: Globex Partners LLC, a Massachusetts limited liability company

key_details.label: Term
key_details.evidence_quote: for a period of three (3) years from the Effective Date

key_details.label: Confidentiality survival
key_details.evidence_quote: survive expiration for an additional period of five (5) years

key_details.label: Permitted use
key_details.value: Confidential Information may be used solely for the Purpose
key_details.evidence_quote: use the Confidential Information solely for the Purpose

key_details.label: IP / license
key_details.value: No license granted to the Recipient
key_details.evidence_quote: No license, by implication or otherwise, is granted to the Recipient

key_details.label: Termination
key_details.value: Either party may terminate on 30 days' written notice
key_details.evidence_quote: terminate this Agreement upon thirty (30) days

key_details.label: Governing law
key_details.evidence_quote: the laws of the State of Delaware

key_details.label: Liability cap
key_details.evidence_quote: shall not exceed one thousand U.S. dollars (USD $1,000)
